channel.title: Posts on Ziya Shalbuzov
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Ziya Shalbuzov

item.title: welcome to my cybersecurity blog!
item.description:
hi!

That’s my first post. I will post there about what I learn in cybersecurity to improve myself and teach some stuff! I’m currently learning blue team after getting some knowledge about red team (OWASP top 10, attacker techniques etc.). I also have fundamental network knowledge and did practice blue team too. But I will create home lab and learn it better. Anyway, see you in future posts!
